name: maxoperf
description: Load & browser performance testing — drive MaxoPerf runs from Claude Desktop with your own API key.
long_description: MaxoPerf is a hosted load- and browser-performance-testing platform. This extension bridges Claude Desktop to the remote MaxoPerf MCP server at https://app.maxoperf.com/mcp via the standard `mcp-remote` stdio-to-HTTP adapter, so Claude can run tests, fetch results, and analyze hotspots on your behalf. Requires a MaxoPerf API key (Console -> Settings -> API keys).

api_key.title: MaxoPerf API key
api_key.description: Bearer token for the MaxoPerf MCP server (Console -> Settings -> API keys). Never stored outside your local Claude Desktop config.

io.maxoperf/packaging.note: manifest_version 0.3 has no native remote-server type (Anthropic guidance: MCPB is the secondary, local/stdio distribution path; remote connectors are recommended for hosted servers). This bundle wraps our remote Streamable-HTTP server with the widely-used `mcp-remote` stdio<->HTTP adapter so Claude Desktop can still one-click install it. `server/shim.js` is a placeholder entry_point satisfying the manifest's `type: node` requirement — the actual command run is `npx -y mcp-remote ...` per mcp_config above.
